title: VieNeu-TTS v3 Turbo reference voice cloning

inputs.referenceText: Đây là đoạn âm thanh tham chiếu dùng để kiểm tra khả năng giữ chất giọng.
inputs.text: Đây là câu kiểm tra giọng clone bằng VieNeu-TTS v3 Turbo. We can also include a short English phrase in the cloned voice [cười].

expected.output: 48 kHz speech generated from the target text using the reference audio timbre.
manualChecks: The reference WAV is accepted by the runtime.
Generated speech follows the target text, not the reference transcript.
The output keeps a recognizable similarity to the reference audio.
Mixed-language text and the non-verbal tag do not stop generation.
